context: Tests whether the agent writes a pre-commit hook that scans git diff --cached for PubNub key prefixes with the documented regex, exits non-zero on hit, and adds the documented guidance comments.

checklist.name: Shebang line
checklist.description: First line of the file is #!/usr/bin/env node

checklist.name: Executes git diff --cached
checklist.description: Code executes a shell command containing 'git diff --cached' (via execSync, spawnSync, or equivalent) and captures stdout

checklist.name: Correct regex
checklist.description: Code uses a regex matching all three of pub-c-, sub-c-, sec-c- prefixes followed by [a-f0-9-]{36}

checklist.name: Exit code 1 on hit
checklist.description: When a key is detected, the script calls process.exit(1) (or returns a non-zero exit code from the entry path)

checklist.name: ERROR message on stderr
checklist.description: On hit, the script prints the documented error message to stderr (console.error or process.stderr.write) — not just stdout

checklist.name: Exit code 0 on clean
checklist.description: When no key is detected, the script exits with code 0 (either implicit or explicit process.exit(0))

checklist.name: Comment mentions all three prefixes
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly lists pub-c-, sub-c-, and sec-c- as the prefixes being detected

checklist.name: Comment recommends a real tool
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment recommends a real-world tool — names at least one of gitleaks, truffleHog, or detect-secrets

checklist.name: Comment notes history risk
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment notes that if a key is found in repo history it must be rotated immediately; the hook only prevents new leaks
